revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-8-140

A relay that operates at a preset value of overload.


Note:  An overload relay is usually made to respond to current, but the response may be to power, temperature, etc.

{{IALAFooter}}
